description: Source links for positioning attachments, positioning aids, supports, holders and pads — Getinge/Maquet accessories, Allen Medical/Hillrom/Baxter

entries.notes: Radiolucent multi-purpose plate for back section. Compatible with Alphamaquet 1150, Otesus, Magnus, Yuno II table systems. Catalogue available: maquet-operating-tables-accessories-catalog-110262-en.pdf
Radiolucent horseshoe head rest for prone and supine procedures. Part of Maquet head positioning accessory range. Compatible with Alphamaquet and Otesus systems.
Motor-driven device for knee prosthetics, arthroscopic and open surgical procedures, and fracture treatment. Mounts on Maquet table systems.
SFC and IPC pads for levelled weight pressure distribution. Latex-free. Adapts to body temperature. Available for all Maquet table platforms.

entries.system_name: Maquet Leg Holder / Leg Plate Set
entries.notes: Flexible four-segment leg plates and leg holders for gynaecological and urological procedures. Modular attachment to Maquet table rail system.

Orthopaedic beach chair with Lift-Assist technology for shoulder surgery. Lightweight design. Mounts to operating table. Compatible with Allen Universal Head Positioner. Marketed via Hillrom / Baxter.
Compatible with Allen Lift-Assist Beach Chair, Allen Table-Powered Beach Chair, Allen Manual Lift Beach Chair, and Allen OR Table Adaptor. Used in shoulder and cranial procedures.
Vacuum-based lateral and steep Trendelenburg positioner. Secures patient during lateral positioning for hip, thoracic, and urological procedures. Available in lateral and steep-Trend variants.

entries.system_name: Allen Lateral Surgical Position Set (Advance Table Lateral System)
entries.notes: Complete lateral position set for the Allen Advance surgery table. Creates patient flex positions for access to surgical target. Used in hip, thoracic, and kidney procedures.
C-shaped shoulder pads to prevent patient sliding in Trendelenburg. Designed for gynaecology, urology, laparoscopy, general and robotic surgery. Conforms to patient anatomy.
